summary: A recorded One America News remote interview, posted by the USCIS Director. He appears by video against a night Washington skyline showing the US Capitol and the Washington Monument, wearing glasses and a dark suit. An OAN bug and a 'Real America with Dan Ball' graphic appear, with a lower-third chyron reading 'APPEALS COURT ORDERS JUDGE TO END CONTEMPT INVESTIGATION OF TRUMP'S DEPORTATION FLIGHTS'. The narration concerns keeping the country safe and litigation over the agency's authority. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: The USCIS Director speaks by video against a night Washington skyline with the Capitol and Washington Monument; chyron 'APPEALS COURT ORDERS JUDGE TO END CONTEMPT INVESTIGATION OF TRUMP'S DEPORTATION FLIGHTS'; OAN bug.
Same framing as he continues his remarks to camera.

notable_text: APPEALS COURT ORDERS JUDGE TO END CONTEMPT INVESTIGATION OF TRUMP'S DEPORTATION FLIGHTS; OAN; Real America with Dan Ball
